cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/taskkit/__init__.py b/taskkit/__init__.py
index e13f93a..2cd39fb 100644
--- a/taskkit/__init__.py
+++ b/taskkit/__init__.py
@@ -4,3 +4,6 @@ datetime.date, or None meaning no due date)."""
 
 def titles(tasks):
     return [t["title"] for t in tasks]
+
+def in_order(tasks):
+    return sorted(tasks, key=lambda t: (-t["priority"], t["due"] is None, t["due"]))

cases.name: crashes_on_none
cases.diff:
diff --git a/taskkit/__init__.py b/taskkit/__init__.py
index e13f93a..7c725b5 100644
--- a/taskkit/__init__.py
+++ b/taskkit/__init__.py
@@ -4,3 +4,6 @@ datetime.date, or None meaning no due date)."""
 
 def titles(tasks):
     return [t["title"] for t in tasks]
+
+def in_order(tasks):
+    return sorted(tasks, key=lambda t: (-t["priority"], t["due"]))

cases.name: none_sorts_first
cases.diff:
diff --git a/taskkit/__init__.py b/taskkit/__init__.py
index e13f93a..ab61457 100644
--- a/taskkit/__init__.py
+++ b/taskkit/__init__.py
@@ -4,3 +4,6 @@ datetime.date, or None meaning no due date)."""
 
 def titles(tasks):
     return [t["title"] for t in tasks]
+
+def in_order(tasks):
+    return sorted(tasks, key=lambda t: (-t["priority"], t["due"] is not None, t["due"]))
